title: Formation Constants of the Chelates of 4-Nitro-Benzilidene -Ortho-Carboxy-aniline with Some Bivalent Metal Ions
author: M.S. MAYADEO
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Department of Chemistry. Ramnarain Ruia College, Matunga, Bombay-400 019. 

  Manuscript received 24 January 1979. revised 10 July 1979, accepted 11 August 1979.  

 Potentiometric statues have been carried out on metal chelates or Cu 2+ , Ni 2+ , Co 2+  and Zn 2+  with 4-nitro-benzilidene-ortho-earboxy-aniline. The dissociation constant (pK 1 ) of the reagent and the formation constants of its metal chelates have been determined by Bjerrum's method at 25°±0.1° and at ionic strength of 0.1  M , in 75:25 percent (v/v) dioxan : water medium.
steps_raw:
